description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.9 with pip caching, and then performs a series of steps including updating the Apt cache, installing a coverage toolchain, initializing the environment, compiling and testing in WebAssembly and NaCl modes, uploading built app packages, building a coverage report, and commenting on the pull request with test results.
